question_id_original: Apa itu pola pikir 3P dan mengapa itu merusak?

answer_en: The 3P mindset is the three traps of thinking that can make it hard for us to emerge from disaster. First, personalization: we blame ourselves completely, when many factors are beyond our control. Second, pervasiveness: we feel that one failure destroys all aspects of life. Third, permanence: we believe that this suffering will last. This pattern is destructive because it makes us focus on the things that cannot be changed, instead of looking for solutions or lessons from the situation.
